judgment.summary: Strong growth and margins are offset by significant debt and negative free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.7%; next earnings date is 2026-06-10.
positives: Revenue growth 21.7% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 26.7% indicate robust top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 25.3% and return on equity 57.6% demonstrate strong profitability and efficient use of shareholder capital.
Forward P/E of 23.71 is attractive relative to the trailing P/E of 34.19, suggesting expected earnings growth.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 415.26 is extremely high, indicating substantial leverage.
Free cash flow is negative $-22.30B TTM, suggesting the company is burning cash.
Total debt of $162.16B is a significant financial burden.
Beta of 1.54 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Oracle is expanding its clinical research capabilities through AI integration, a move that could drive future growth. This development comes as Wedbush reiterates a bullish stance, citing strong demand visibility that they believe investors are currently underestimating. The stock is approaching its next earnings date, which could provide further clarity on the company's performance and strategic initiatives.

headlines.title: Oracle Corporation (ORCL) Expands Clinical Research with AI Integration
Wedbush Remains Bullish On Oracle (ORCL), Says Investors Are Overlooking Demand Visibility

examples.body: $ORCL $GRRR and under followed Cell Therapy winner LCTX driving my portfolio much higher over the past two days in a Tough Market.
$ORCL i see big buyers & shorts buying in and only small sellers. See you at $200 tomorrow again.
